SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands

Class CommandRegistry

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry<net.minecraft.commands.CommandSourceStack>
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.CommandRegistry
public final class CommandRegistry extends dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry<net.minecraft.commands.CommandSourceStack>
Handles registration and initialization of commands in Fabric.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public static void initialize(String modName, String permissionPrefix, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.Logger loggerInstance)
      Initializes the command registry with the mod name and permission prefix.
      Parameters:
      modName - mod name for namespaced commands
      permissionPrefix - prefix for permissions
      loggerInstance - magicutils logger

    • initialize

      public static void initialize(String modName, String permissionPrefix, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.Logger loggerInstance, int opLevel)
      Initializes the command registry with an explicit op level.
      Parameters:
      modName - mod name for namespaced commands
      permissionPrefix - prefix for permissions
      loggerInstance - magicutils logger
      opLevel - permission level to treat as OP

    • create

      public static CommandRegistry create(String modName, String permissionPrefix, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.Logger loggerInstance)
      Creates a registry instance without replacing the default registry.
      Parameters:
      modName - mod name for namespaced commands
      permissionPrefix - prefix for permissions
      loggerInstance - magicutils logger
      Returns:
      registry instance

      public static CommandRegistry createDefault(String modName, String permissionPrefix, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.Logger loggerInstance, int opLevel)
      Creates a registry instance and sets it as default.

      modName - mod name for namespaced commands
      permissionPrefix - prefix for permissions
      loggerInstance - magicutils logger
      opLevel - permission level to treat as OP

      public static CommandRegistry get(String modName)
      Returns the registry instance by mod name.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      registry or null

    • registerAll

      public static void registerAll(String modName, com.mojang.brigadier.CommandDispatcher<net.minecraft.commands.CommandSourceStack> dispatcher, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.MagicCommand... commands)
      Registers multiple commands at once for a mod.
      Parameters:
      modName - mod name
      dispatcher - dispatcher to register on
      commands - commands to register

    • registerAll

      public static void registerAll(String modName, com.mojang.brigadier.CommandDispatcher<net.minecraft.commands.CommandSourceStack> dispatcher, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.CommandSpec<?>... specs)
      Registers multiple builder-defined commands at once for a mod.
      Parameters:
      modName - mod name
      dispatcher - dispatcher to register on
      specs - command specs to register
